positive: A stylized, high-contrast illustration of a cosmic adventure: a solitary astronaut floating in deep space, viewing a massive, bioluminescent nebula shaped like an abstract wave. The astronaut is rendered in a clean silhouette against the vibrant, glowing background. Minimalistic geometric celestial elements (stars, rings, planets) are scattered around. Use a deep indigo, vibrant cyan, and electric magenta color palette. Graphic novel style, strong graphic lines, flat vector elements mixed with cosmic glow effects. Ideal for screen printing on dark apparel. Central composition, rule of thirds applied to the nebula's curve. Highly detailed, 8k digital art.
negative: blurry, artifacts, text, signature, watermark, low detail, poor anatomy, messy, jpeg compression, grain, logos, typography, extra limbs, copyright, cartoon, realistic photo
